© 2021. All rights reserved.

Projects

  • Vet Dosages [demo][source] My mom, who works as an emergency room veterinarian needed a faster way to calculate dog and cat medicinal dosages and costs given the weight of the animal.
  • ⭐️ Starlight [source] ‘hackable’ voice command assistant written in Python using Google’s Text-to-speech apis, designed to run on linux/unix enviornments
  • ☕️ Java-Net [demo][source] a neural network built from scratch in Java–has its own full-fledged matrix library.
  • 🚉 MERN Material UI [source] responsive boilerplate using Material UI and MERN (MongoDB, Express, React, Node) to create a login system (hashing, salting, encrypted requests) with material design
  • 👻 Ghost-Tufte [source] fantastic looking Ghost blog theme styled after Edward Tufte CSS 👩‍🎨.
  • Newcomen [demo][source] slick and minimal jekyll blog theme for writers/programmers

^^I always try to have good documentation!
